comment: 45yo female lifelong non-smoker with sustained household ETS exposure — childhood (both parents smokers indoors 1980s-90s) + adult cohabitation with active-smoker spouse for 20 years. IARC Group 1 + US Surgeon General-confirmed cause of lung cancer in non-smokers (~20-25% increased RR). Engine routes to PreventionPlan recommending cohabitant smoking-cessation support + workplace smoke-free environment + USPSTF screening eligibility check (likely ineligible for LDCT given no personal smoking) + symptom-triggered evaluation. Validates v0.3 RF-ENVIRONMENTAL-SECONDHAND-SMOKE-LUNG-PREVENTION pilot.
